method: Public-source held-out records. Sanitized summaries only; not copied private traces. These records were not used to tune rules in this pass.

cases.raw_error_excerpt: Docker image NodeJS version mismatch; browser executable missing; playwright install needed
cases.notes: Docker/runtime mismatch should route to environment/toolchain.

cases.raw_error_excerpt: npx playwright install freezes after extracting browser archive; executable does not exist
cases.notes: Install/executable failure should not be treated as page failure.

cases.raw_error_excerpt: Target page, context or browser has been closed after Edge crashed before finishing test execution
connectOverCDP timeout; CDP WebSocket silent disconnect; cannot list tabs
CLI installer prepends private virtualenv to PATH and shadows Python; ModuleNotFoundError
Invalid JSON from model output while browser agent is running
cases.notes: Model-output parse issue without browser evidence should be downgraded or unknown rather than guessed.

cases.raw_error_excerpt: Browser cookie store ignored when intercepting requests using page.route; route mock request missing session cookie
cases.notes: Known current limit: mixed route interception and cookie-store symptom is not confidently diagnosed from a short log.

cases.raw_error_excerpt: locator.click: TimeoutError button not found after layout release; old selector resolved to 0 elements
download.saveAs ENOENT no such file or directory; download path missing
HTTP 429 too many requests after repeated automated requests; rate limit
